title: BindOn
description: A Minecraft Forge mod that allows servers to simulate key presses on players' clients using commands
body:
---
![petpet-transparent](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/ec84d897-ea97-4d03-8a7a-c4caf5a9a59a)
---

## 📌 BindOn – Remote Key Bind Control

**BindOn** is a Forge mod for Minecraft 1.20.1 that allows server operators to simulate key presses on players via commands.

This is useful for **custom maps, cinematic experiences, modpacks**, or server-side storytelling.

---

### 🔧 Features

* 🕹️ Send simulated key presses to players
* 🎥 Supports cinematic controls: `F1`, `F5`, etc.
* ✅ Supports all keys from `A–Z`, `0–9`, and more
* 🛠️ Compatible with `Shift`, `Ctrl`, `Alt` modifiers
* ⚡ Works via commands like `/bindon f5 @a`
* 📄 View available keys via `/bindon help`

---

### 📜 Example Commands

```mcfunction
/bindon f1 @p
```

👆 Hides HUD for the nearest player (as if they pressed F1)

```mcfunction
/bindhelp
```

👆 Shows a list of available keys you can simulate

---

### 🎯 Use Cases

* Custom adventure maps
* Cutscenes and camera transitions
* Modpacks with forced perspectives
* Minigames or lobby presentation

---

### 📦 Installation

* Requires **Minecraft Forge** 1.20.1
* Just drop it in the `mods/` folder

---
